title: Unemployment rate | Stats NZ
content:
This indicator is the official unemployment rate for New Zealand.
The unemployment rate reflects conditions of the labour market and economy overall. It gives a sense of the number of people seeking work.
The data in this indicator is seasonally adjusted.
Unemployment rate by sex, seasonally adjusted, March 2012–March 2026 quarters

## Underutilisation rate
